files.description: Core constitutional definition: what Software Intelligence IS, PI Core / domain module separation, 10 cognition functions, attachment model, artifact contract, corridor activation criteria, expanded prohibitions
Marketplace as domain cognition module ecosystem: not-plugins distinction, module pattern contract, first module precedent, future modules, registration, versioning, governance, strategic alignment
Per-persona SW-Intel consumption: BOARDROOM 7 executive channels, BALANCED vocabulary enrichment, DENSE topology annotation, INVESTIGATION full lineage trace
Pressure-topology integration: orphaned artifact gap, target data flow through SW-Intel, zone rendering requirements, topology reactivity model, persona-specific projections
§5.5 reusable concept definitions: 8 primitives, input/output contracts, calibration assumptions, extension points, module responsibility map
Added Software Intelligence and Domain Cognition Module locked terms. Updated Marketplace definition from 'extension ecosystem' to 'governed ecosystem of domain cognition modules'
Updated product hierarchy and invariants. Added stream to ontology lineage. Added Domain Cognition Module Architecture section with maturity classification
